context: Tests whether the Contacts skill prevents invalid key constants, avoids unnecessary full-image fetches, and narrows notes entitlement guidance.

checklist.name: Name key correction
checklist.description: Rejects CNContactCompleteNameKey and uses CNContactFormatter.descriptorForRequiredKeys(for:) or valid individual name keys.

checklist.name: Image over-fetching
checklist.description: Avoids full-resolution CNContactImageDataKey for list rows by default and recommends fetching only displayed fields, such as thumbnail image data for avatars.

checklist.name: Notes entitlement
checklist.description: States that CNContactNoteKey or CNContact.note read/write access requires com.apple.developer.contacts.notes on modern Apple platforms.

checklist.name: Apple approval
checklist.description: Mentions that the contacts notes entitlement requires Apple approval before public App Store distribution.
